items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for sending physical postcards as appointment reminders.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for sending physical postcards as appointment reminders for elderly patients without email. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga, such as booking and compliance, without addressing the specific requirement for appointment reminders, leading to an inconclusive status regarding this validation.
